description: This image is a branding banner featuring the European Union and Copernicus Programme logos and text. On the left, the European Union flag is displayed, consisting of 12 yellow stars arranged in a circle on a blue background. To the right of the flag, the text "PROGRAMME OF THE EUROPEAN UNION" is presented in grey, sans-serif capital letters. On the far right, the Copernicus logo is shown, which features a stylized blue 'C' shape partially enclosing the word "Copernicus" in blue text, with the tagline "Europe's eyes on Earth" in smaller blue text positioned directly below it.
